testcase.name: testStop

testcase.name: testStartAsNonLeader
testcase.system-err: [main] WARN com.minisql.master.balance.LoadBalancer - Not the leader, LoadBalancer will not start

testcase.name: testStartAsLeader
testcase.system-err: [main] INFO com.minisql.master.balance.LoadBalancer - LoadBalancer started, check period: 300000ms

testcase.name: testStartTwice
